content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:19. From this zoomed-in image, I can confirm the neighbor atoms connected to C:19:

- C:18 (carbon) - connected via a bond
- C:20 (carbon) - connected via a bond  
- H:30 (hydrogen) - connected via a bond

These are the three atoms covalently bonded to C:19.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_534.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 534.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 19 (C) are:
- Atom index 18, element C
- Atom index 20, element C  
- Atom index 30, element H

Geomconf_index: 534

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 19, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
